reason: Agent QA-20260424-205608-30mg successfully received message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and responded with "4" within seconds.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing sidebar with agents list.
Located agent "QA-20260424-205608-30mg" in the sidebar — Agent found in left sidebar list.
Clicked on agent in sidebar — Agent page opened, showing agent home with message input.
Verified agent status — Status shown as "idle" in the top right of the interface.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in input field — Message text entered successfully in the message input box.
Clicked send button — Message sent and agent began processing immediately.
Agent responded with "4" — Response received almost instantly, displayed in chat view.
Verified response contains "4" — Response clearly shows "4" as the answer to the math question.
Took final screenshot — Screenshot step4-response-received.png captures the complete conversation with the correct response.
